raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill AB 1594 aims to empower local/state governments and Californians to sue manufacturers and sellers of firearms for harm caused by their products.",
    "The threat of civil litigation could compel the gun industry to take steps to prevent illegal sales and theft to reduce gun violence.",
    "The Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act (PLCAA) shields gun producers and dealers from civil liability when their products are used to commit crimes.",
    "An exception to the PLCAA allows companies and sellers to be held accountable under state law if they break state laws.",
    "Gun violence leads to nearly forty thousand deaths in the United States each year, averaging 100 people shot and killed daily.",
    "Part of the solution to reducing gun violence is focused on how particular guns are manufactured and distributed in California.",
    "AB 1594 will focus on the gun industry's responsibilities as defined in California law, including meeting manufacturing standards.",
    "AB 1594 includes requirements for the sale of approved firearm safety devices with all gun purchases.",
    "AB 1594 mandates rigorous background checks and testing of all gun buyers.",
    "AB 1594 proposes banning the sale or manufacturing of assault weapons and related parts.",
    "AB 1594 includes provisions for maintaining meticulous sales records.",
    "AB 1594 aims to implement greater safeguards against straw purchases and theft."
  ]
}
```
